ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drg_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DRG category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the DRG category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the DRG category */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Long description of the DRG category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID for hierarchical relationships */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drg_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES drg_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time for the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the account was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the account */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID for the role assignment */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID for the role assignment */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
